reproduction_environment.description: Windows Sandbox is a completely isolated, disposable Windows environment with no prior state, no shared filesystem, no installed software, and no memory of the original system.
sandbox_characteristics: Fresh Windows installation — never touched WiltonVerse before
No access to original files except what was manually copied
Destroyed completely after session — unrepeatable environment
reproduction_environment.original_machine: AMD Ryzen 7 1700X — ASUS PRIME B350-PLUS — Windows 11
reproduction_environment.reproduction_machine: Windows Sandbox — isolated virtual environment on same hardware
reproduction_environment.independence_level: FULL — virgin OS, no shared state, no prior context

promotion_basis: Full cycle executed in Windows Sandbox — completely virgin isolated environment
13/13 canonical file hashes identical between original and sandbox runs
Verification verdict PASS in environment with no prior WiltonVerse context
Sandbox had no Git, no Python, no shared state — pure cold reproduction
Evidence bundle generated independently in sandbox
G6 gate satisfied: independent environment, no shared memory, matching hashes

what_this_proves: The WiltonVerse runtime pack is portable and reproducible
It executes correctly in a completely clean environment
Its canonical files are stable and tamper-evident
No founder context or memory is required to run the governed cycle
Any operator with Windows can reproduce this result
honest_boundaries: This reproduction used the same physical hardware — different virtual environment.
The Sandbox qualifies as an independent OS environment with no shared state.
For maximum institutional rigor, reproduction on a physically separate machine by a third party is the gold standard.
This document is valid evidence of VERIFIED status per WiltonVerse Truth Policy.
All hashes are independently verifiable by any auditor.
note: Built without formal academic background. Driven by curiosity, persistence, and the discipline to demand evidence over narrative.
